mapper.select: SELECT (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM users) AS total_users, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM user_browse_history WHERE DATE(browse_time) = CURDATE()) AS today_browse_count, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM artifacts) AS total_artifacts, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM museums) AS total_museums, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM user_comments) AS total_comments, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM audit_records WHERE manual_audit_result = 'pending') AS pending_audits, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM user_uploads) AS total_uploads, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM user_posts) AS total_posts

SELECT COUNT(*) FROM ( SELECT user_id AS uid FROM user_browse_history WHERE browse_time >= DATE_SUB(NOW(), INTERVAL #{minutes} MINUTE) UNION SELECT operator_id AS uid FROM backup_records WHERE created_at >= DATE_SUB(NOW(), INTERVAL #{minutes} MINUTE) AND operator_id IS NOT NULL ) t
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM users WHERE DATE(registered_at) = CURDATE()

SELECT ( (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM user_comments WHERE DATE(created_at) = CURDATE()) + (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM user_uploads WHERE DATE(created_at) = CURDATE()) + (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM user_posts WHERE DATE(created_at) = CURDATE()) )
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM audit_records WHERE manual_audit_result = 'pending'

WITH RECURSIVE dates AS ( SELECT DATE_SUB(CURDATE(), INTERVAL #{days} DAY) AS d UNION ALL SELECT DATE_ADD(d, INTERVAL 1 DAY) FROM dates WHERE d < CURDATE() ) SELECT dates.d AS date, COALESCE(u.cnt, 0) AS count FROM dates LEFT JOIN ( SELECT DATE(created_at) AS d, COUNT(*) AS cnt FROM users WHERE created_at >= DATE_SUB(CURDATE(), INTERVAL #{days} DAY) GROUP BY DATE(created_at) ) u ON dates.d = u.d ORDER BY dates.d
SELECT a.museum_id AS museumId, m.name AS museumName, COUNT(*) AS count FROM artifacts a LEFT JOIN museums m ON a.museum_id = m.id GROUP BY a.museum_id, m.name ORDER BY count DESC LIMIT 20
SELECT type AS name, COUNT(*) AS count FROM artifacts WHERE type IS NOT NULL AND type != '' GROUP BY type ORDER BY count DESC
SELECT d.name_zh AS name, COUNT(*) AS count FROM artifacts a LEFT JOIN dynasties d ON a.dynasty_id = d.id WHERE a.dynasty_id IS NOT NULL GROUP BY a.dynasty_id, d.name_zh ORDER BY count DESC

WITH RECURSIVE dates AS ( SELECT DATE_SUB(CURDATE(), INTERVAL #{days} DAY) AS d UNION ALL SELECT DATE_ADD(d, INTERVAL 1 DAY) FROM dates WHERE d < CURDATE() ) SELECT dates.d AS date, COALESCE(v.cnt, 0) AS count FROM dates LEFT JOIN ( SELECT DATE(browse_time) AS d, COUNT(*) AS cnt FROM user_browse_history WHERE browse_time >= DATE_SUB(CURDATE(), INTERVAL #{days} DAY) GROUP BY DATE(browse_time) ) v ON dates.d = v.d ORDER BY dates.d

WITH RECURSIVE dates AS ( SELECT DATE_SUB(CURDATE(), INTERVAL #{days} DAY) AS d UNION ALL SELECT DATE_ADD(d, INTERVAL 1 DAY) FROM dates WHERE d < CURDATE() ) SELECT dates.d AS date, COALESCE(v.cnt, 0) AS visits, COALESCE(u.cnt, 0) AS newUsers, COALESCE(c.cnt, 0) AS contentCounts, COALESCE(a.cnt, 0) AS newArtifacts FROM dates LEFT JOIN ( SELECT DATE(browse_time) AS d, COUNT(*) AS cnt FROM user_browse_history WHERE browse_time >= DATE_SUB(CURDATE(), INTERVAL #{days} DAY) GROUP BY DATE(browse_time) ) v ON dates.d = v.d LEFT JOIN ( SELECT DATE(created_at) AS d, COUNT(*) AS cnt FROM users WHERE created_at >= DATE_SUB(CURDATE(), INTERVAL #{days} DAY) GROUP BY DATE(created_at) ) u ON dates.d = u.d LEFT JOIN ( SELECT d, COUNT(*) AS cnt FROM ( SELECT DATE(created_at) AS d FROM user_comments WHERE created_at >= DATE_SUB(CURDATE(), INTERVAL #{days} DAY) UNION ALL SELECT DATE(created_at) AS d FROM user_uploads WHERE created_at >= DATE_SUB(CURDATE(), INTERVAL #{days} DAY) UNION ALL SELECT DATE(created_at) AS d FROM user_posts WHERE created_at >= DATE_SUB(CURDATE(), INTERVAL #{days} DAY) ) t GROUP BY d ) c ON dates.d = c.d LEFT JOIN ( SELECT DATE(created_at) AS d, COUNT(*) AS cnt FROM artifacts WHERE created_at >= DATE_SUB(CURDATE(), INTERVAL #{days} DAY) GROUP BY DATE(created_at) ) a ON dates.d = a.d ORDER BY dates.d

SELECT id, alert_type AS alertType, severity, title, message, source, status, created_at AS createdAt FROM system_alerts WHERE status = 'active' ORDER BY CASE severity WHEN 'critical' THEN 0 WHEN 'warning' THEN 1 ELSE 2 END, created_at DESC LIMIT 10
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO system_alerts (alert_type, severity, title, message, source, status, created_at) VALUES (#{alertType}, #{severity}, #{title}, #{message}, #{source}, 'active', NOW())
